title: Gene panel selection for targeted spatial transcriptomics.
author: Zhang Y Petukhov V Biederstedt E Que R Zhang K Kharchenko PV
content: S-EPMC10054990 PMC10054990 Gene panel selection for targeted spatial transcriptomics. Targeted spatial transcriptomics hold particular promise in analysis of complex tissues. Most such methods, however, measure only a limited panel of transcripts, which need to be selected in advance to inform
